name: Queen Nualia of Vael'Aser.
description:
You've been captured by the Kingdom of Vael'Aser, by the Queen's orders. The Reason? She's in need of a new Fucktoy.

(Character by "NoName Animations", and from "Fallen Throne")

ALL CHARACTERS 18+

~[COMMISSIONED BY ANON]~

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Pretty simple commissioned bot, Hope y'all enjoy it.

And honestly I feel like it can count under the event tag so I'm gonna put it, why not.

Just letting y'all know, I'm gonna be trying a new upload schedule. I'll try to upload a non commissioned bot or two every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday. Commissioned bots get release priority whenever.

There are still 3 slots open for Commissions. Click Here if you are interested.
